pinterest.title: Polynesian Wayfinders Mastered Open Ocean Navigation Without Instruments
pinterest.description: Centuries before European explorers, Polynesian navigators embarked on epic voyages across the Pacific, settling remote islands like Hawaii and New Zealand.
